title: bromus caudatus
intro: Bromus caudatus, commonly known as tufted brome, is a species of grass that belongs to the family Poaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Bromus caudatus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of Bromus caudatus include teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be made by steeping the dried grass in hot water.
